uplink.description: CO2 report (reportType 0x07): CO2 500 ppm, battery 9.0 V; NH3/Noise absent (0xFFFF)
uplink._note: TTN 'Status report - 7' example input. ORACLE: upstream ra0715_r72615_ra0715y_r72615a.js decodes Volt 9.0, CO2 500 (slot1 0x1388=5000, /10 ppm); NH3/Noise 0xFFFF (NoSensor, dropped).

uplink.description: Temperature/Humidity report (reportType 0x0C): -20 C, 10 %, battery 9.0 V; WindSpeed absent
uplink._note: TTN 'Status report - 12' example input. ORACLE: upstream decodes Temperature -20 (slot1 0xF830=63536, two's-complement -2000, /100), Humidity 10 (slot2 0x03E8=1000, /100); WindSpeed 0xFFFF (dropped).

uplink.description: Temperature/Humidity report (reportType 0x0C) with positive temperature: 23.5 C, 55.2 %
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic in-bounds input; upstream decodes Volt 3.6, Temperature 23.5 (slot1 0x092E=2350, /100), Humidity 55.2 (slot2 0x1590=5520, /100).

uplink.description: CO2 report (reportType 0x07) with low-battery flag: battery 3.0 V, lowBattery, CO2 450 ppm
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic in-bounds input; byte3 0x9E has high bit set (upstream emits Volt '3(low battery)'), low 7 bits 0x1E=30 -> 3.0 V; CO2 450 (slot1 0x1194=4500, /10).
TTN 'Startup version report' example input. ORACLE: upstream returns device/SW/HW/datecode, no measurement.

uplink.description: Gas report (reportType 0x05: O3/CO/NO) carries no climate/air-quality measurement
uplink._note: TTN 'Status report - 5' example input. ORACLE: upstream decodes O3/CO/NO, none of which map to this device's vocabulary.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 7 is unsupported (no measurement)
uplink._note: TTN 'Configure report response' example input. ORACLE: upstream returns config status on fPort 7, not a measurement.
